mapper.insert: insert into permission (permission_id, permission_level, max_reserve_days, max_concurrent_devices, description) values (#{permission_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{permission_level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{max_reserve_days,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{max_concurrent_devices,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into permission
permission_id,
permission_level,
max_reserve_days,
max_concurrent_devices,
description,
#{permission_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{permission_level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{max_reserve_days,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{max_concurrent_devices,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update permission
permission_level = #{permission_level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
max_reserve_days = #{max_reserve_days,jdbcType=INTEGER},
max_concurrent_devices = #{max_concurrent_devices,jdbcType=INTEGER},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where permission_id = #{permission_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
